comments.author: 0xElCapitan
comments.text: Sprint 4 senior review Round 2 APPROVED. CI-1 (Singer 2001 temporal impossibility) corrected with book-chapter form + uncertain tag. CI-2 (HIGH→MEDIUM demotions for operational-doc-only evidence) applied to SWPC_GOES, SWPC_GOES_SECONDARY, SWPC_DSCOVR, CLASS_RELIABILITY. CI-3 (§1.1 Citation Verification Status section with 4-label taxonomy + manifest entry shape extension + section-level disclaimers + inline tags). CI-4 (Wheatland 2001, Veronig 2002, Pulkkinen 2013 tagged at inline + §12). 93/93 tests pass, validator green, zero scope leakage. Doc 887 → 1139 lines (+252 verification metadata). Awaiting /audit-sprint sprint-4.

comments.author: 0xElCapitan
comments.text: Sprint 4 audit CHANGES_REQUIRED — 2 HIGH-severity findings. CR-1: corona-evidence-006 (Kp σ definitive=0.33, T2 settlement-critical) YAML has confidence:high + provisional:false + 'Direct citation; high confidence' notes — contradicts §4.2 inline tag (ENGINEER_CURATED_REQUIRES_VERIFICATION) and §4.5 section-level disclaimer. CR-2: corona-evidence-020 (log_flux linearization, T1 settlement-critical) YAML has confidence:high — contradicts §8.3 Round 2 demotion to MEDIUM/OPERATIONAL_DOC_ONLY. Round 2 review missed §4 + §8 manifest entries (Round 1 CI-2 scope was §7 only). Round 3 fix: YAML-only, ~10 min, demote both entries' confidence to medium + add verification_status field + flip provisional to true + add promotion_path. Other 7 focus areas clean. Operator focus #7 violation.

comments.author: 0xElCapitan
comments.text: Sprint 4 audit Round 3 APPROVED - LETS FUCKING GO. CR-1 (corona-evidence-006 Kp σ definitive) + CR-2 (corona-evidence-020 log_flux linearization) closed via YAML-only fixes: confidence high→medium + verification_status field added + provisional flipped to true + explicit promotion_paths. 7-of-8 focus areas already clean Round 1; focus #7 violation (settlement-critical HIGH-literature-derived without verification) now closed for both entries. 93/93 tests pass, validator green, zero scope leakage. COMPLETED marker created.
